scene_input.scene_summary: ʿAbd Yālīl and his brothers, Masūd and Ḥabīb, mock and insult the Prophet Muhammad, refusing to listen to his message.
scene_input.key_visual_action: ʿAbd Yālīl pointing at Muhammad, with a sneer on his face, while Masūd and Ḥabīb laugh
scene_input.setting: A meeting hall or a courtyard in the Thaqīf's city

schema_output.scene_title: ʿAbd Yālīl and his brothers mock the Prophet Muhammad
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 100
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of listening to others and respecting their message

characters.name: ʿAbd Yālīl
characters.appearance: tall, muscular build, wearing a fine white thobe and a black woolen cloak with a white turban, standing with a sneer on his face

characters.name: Masūd
characters.appearance: slender build, wearing a white thobe and a brown woolen cloak with a cloth head covering, laughing

characters.name: Ḥabīb
characters.appearance: young, lean build, wearing a white thobe and a light brown woolen cloak with a simple head covering, joining in laughter

characters.name: Muhammad
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, looking calm and patient

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿAbd Yālīl and his brothers mocked the Prophet Muhammad, refusing to listen to his message.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A large, dimly lit meeting hall or courtyard in the Thaqīf's city, with stone or mud-brick walls and a high ceiling. Late afternoon sunlight filters through a series of narrow windows, casting warm rays across the floor. In the center of the room, a group of four men stand facing each other. The man in the green cloak stands calmly with his arms crossed, looking patient. To his left, a tall man with a sneer on his face points at the central figure, wearing a fine white thobe and a black woolen cloak. On the right, two younger men laugh together, one wearing a white thobe and a brown woolen cloak, the other a white thobe and a light brown woolen cloak. The atmosphere is tense and sarcastic, with a sense of mockery in the air. Medium shot from slightly above, looking down on the group. Warm beige, brown, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'the central figure' -> 'the man in the green cloak'
